description: Lets the twinme.me /widget page running INSIDE the Hummingbird overlay dismiss itself (Esc -> hide_hummingbird). Scoped to the hummingbird window + the twinme.me origin + that single command; no core/plugin APIs are exposed to the remote origin.
//windows: Only the 'hummingbird' overlay window loads /widget?panel=1. The main window is intentionally excluded.
//remote: Extends this capability to the remote twinme.me origin (the /widget page is served from there). https only, apex + subdomains, no other hosts.
//permissions: Exactly the autogenerated app-command permission for hide_hummingbird (declared in build.rs AppManifest::commands). Nothing else.
